use_cases: Landing page hero section for SaaS and tech products with distinctive visual presence
Product launch pages requiring immersive aurora shader backgrounds
Portfolio and creative agency websites seeking modern gradient aesthetics
Marketing campaign entry points with glass-morphism styling
ai_summary: A visually immersive hero component featuring a dynamic aurora shader background with smooth color transitions and gradient effects. The design incorporates glass-morphism elements with backdrop blur, responsive typography, and customizable CTA buttons. Optimized for SaaS landing pages and tech product presentations with a dark, futuristic aesthetic that commands attention on both desktop and mobile platforms.
